channel.title: The Uncommon Engineer — Docs
channel.description: Technical documentation from The Uncommon Engineer

item.title: Bulk-Deleting Outlook Rules from a Mac with PowerShell
item.description: Bulk-delete Outlook inbox rules on macOS when /cleanrules isn't available. PowerShell 7, Exchange Online, Get-InboxRule, Remove-InboxRule, MSAL and Graph fixes.

item.title: How to Enable Linux Terminal on Chromebook (2026)
item.description: Step-by-step guide to enabling the Linux development environment on Chromebook, customising the Penguin terminal prompt, and installing dev tools on Chrome OS.

item.title: GLXTCH Knowledge Lookup — Fixing NZ Search Quality and Building a Benchmark
item.description: Why a Discord bot's Tavily-backed knowledge lookups returned wrong-country results for New Zealand queries, the classifier and heuristic root causes, the fix, and the two-form eval that guards against regressions.

item.title: Algolia Search Integration for Docusaurus - Complete Setup with Cloudflare CDN
item.description: Step-by-step guide to integrating Algolia search into Docusaurus sites with Cloudflare CDN configuration. Enable powerful site search for better user experience.

item.title: AI Trust-Model Decomposition Failure in an Agentic Security Design
item.description: Post-mortem on an LLM-assisted Discord bot security design where high factual accuracy masked a single-axis trust model — authorization and input integrity were conflated.

item.title: AI & Machine Learning Projects Hub: LLM Deployment & GenAI
item.description: Comprehensive collection of AI and machine learning project guides covering LLM deployment, AWS AI services, private AI setups, and generative AI implementations.

item.title: Brother MFC-J4330DW Printer Setup on Linux - Complete Driver Installation Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guide to installing and configuring Brother MFC-J4330DW printer drivers on Linux systems. Includes troubleshooting and wireless setup.

item.title: Algorithms for Systems Design - Scalable Architecture Patterns and Data Structures
item.description: Essential algorithms and data structures for system design interviews and scalable architecture. Learn system design patterns, performance optimization, and distributed systems concepts.

item.title: Beehiiv Custom Domain Setup with Cloudflare - Complete DNS Configuration Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guide to setting up Beehiiv custom domain with Cloudflare DNS. Includes CNAME records, proxy settings, CAA configuration, and troubleshooting for newsletter hosting.

item.title: Computer Science Fundamentals - Bits, Bytes, Hex, and Memory Management
item.description: Essential computer science fundamentals covering bits, bytes, hexadecimal, memory management, and assembly debugging. Learn low-level programming concepts and system internals.

item.title: Docusaurus GitHub Pages Deployment - Complete Setup Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guide to deploying Docusaurus static sites to GitHub Pages with automated CI/CD, custom domains, and deployment configurations.

item.title: iPhone Photo Backup to Linux — Complete Guide (No iTunes)
item.description: Back up iPhone photos to Ubuntu or Debian Linux using libimobiledevice and ifuse. Mount DCIM, automate transfers with rsync. No iTunes or Finder needed.

item.title: KLV Metadata Loss in MPEG-TS — Debugging a One-Byte PES Header Bug with PyAV and ffmpeg
item.description: Debugging KLV metadata loss in an MPEG-TS drone pipeline where PyAV and klvdata fail with 'cannot fit int into an index-sized integer'. Root cause: a single missing byte in the PES packet header.

item.title: Ubiquiti Home Network: Part.2
Claude Code Cost Tracking: AWS Bedrock vs Pro Max (Part 2) — Tag Propagation, Sydney Migration, Bug Fixes
item.description: AIP tag propagation works — but I'd been measuring the wrong thing. A script bug exposed, and a us-east-1 to ap-southeast-2 migration for Auckland latency.

item.title: Tuning a Discord Tier System From Data, Not Vibes
item.description: How to tune Discord bot tier thresholds with real DynamoDB activity data — rolling vs lifetime counters, percentile analysis, and an AWS Lambda re-kick bug fix.

item.title: Claude Code Cost Tracking: AWS Bedrock vs Pro Max (Part 1)
item.description: Compare Claude Code costs on AWS Bedrock vs Pro Max. Covers the Marketplace billing trap, Cost Explorer queries for third-party models, and cache economics.

item.title: Debugging Kiro IDE Agent Terminal Hang
item.description: Debugging Kiro IDE's AI agent hanging on terminal commands — root causes were a missing GLIBCXX native library and zsh/Powerlevel10k interfering with shell integration OSC 633 sequences.

item.title: LangChain + AWS Bedrock Workshop — Deploy LLMs on AWS
item.description: Build and deploy a LangChain application with Amazon Bedrock. Covers LLM integration, BedrockChat setup, prompt templates, and AWS deployment. Full working code.

item.title: Deploy Mistral-7B on AWS SageMaker with Ollama
item.description: Complete tutorial for deploying and running Mistral-7B large language model using Ollama on AWS SageMaker. Includes setup, configuration, and usage examples.

item.title: PrivateGPT Local Setup — Chat with Documents Privately
item.description: Set up PrivateGPT for local RAG — chat with your documents using a local LLM. Covers installation, document ingestion, and FAISS vector store configuration.

item.title: MCP Server Trello Setup with Claude — Connect Trello Boards to AI
item.description: Connect Trello boards to Claude using MCP Server Trello. Covers API credentials, Claude Code and Desktop configuration, and board access setup.

item.title: TechNesian Live Stream: Cloud Demo Notes
item.description: Demo notes for creating EC2 web servers across 3 AWS regions using manual console, CLI, and CloudFormation methods. Prepared for TechNesian live stream.

item.title: AWS ECS Monitoring Workshop — CloudWatch, Container Insights, and Prometheus
item.description: Notes from the AWS ECS monitoring workshop covering CloudWatch Container Insights, Prometheus metrics collection, and ECS service monitoring setup.

item.title: AWS ECS Capacity Providers Workshop — Auto Scaling and Spot Instances
item.description: Notes from the AWS ECS capacity providers workshop covering auto scaling groups, Spot instance integration, and capacity provider strategies for ECS clusters.

item.title: AWS ECS Cats and Dogs Workshop — Microservices on ECS
item.description: Walkthrough of the AWS ECS Cats and Dogs workshop deploying containerised microservices with ECS, ALB, service discovery, and CI/CD pipelines.

item.title: UPNG: AWS Workshops
item.description: AWS workshop links and notes for UPNG sessions covering Amazon Rekognition, Connect, Lex, and other AI/ML services.

item.title: Oh My Zsh + Powerlevel10k Setup Guide for Linux
item.description: Install and configure Oh My Zsh with Powerlevel10k theme, autosuggestions, and syntax highlighting on Ubuntu/Debian. Includes tmux integration and full dotfile config.

item.title: Pi-hole Compromise Detection — Investigating Suspicious DNS Behaviour
item.description: How to investigate a suspected Pi-hole compromise — inspecting Docker containers, checking DNS logs, verifying upstream resolvers, and auditing network traffic.

item.title: Pi-hole DNS Setup - Network-wide Ad Blocking and DNS Filtering
item.description: Complete guide to setting up Pi-hole DNS for network-wide ad blocking and DNS filtering on Ubuntu. Includes installation, configuration, and troubleshooting.

item.title: Pi-hole + Unbound Docker Compose Setup Guide (2026)
item.description: Run Pi-hole with Unbound as a recursive DNS resolver in Docker Compose. Full docker-compose.yml, Unbound config, and network setup included. Tested and updated for 2026.

item.title: The Complete Pi-hole Guide: Docker, Unbound DNS, and Troubleshooting
item.description: Everything you need to run Pi-hole with Unbound recursive DNS in Docker. Setup guides, DNS configuration, SERVFAIL troubleshooting, and FAQ.

item.title: Fixing SERVFAIL DNS Resolution for AWS Console with Pi-hole + Unbound
item.description: Diagnosing and fixing SERVFAIL errors when resolving AWS console domains via Pi-hole + Unbound in a Docker setup.

item.title: Proxmox Cloud-Init VM Template — Ansible Automation Guide
item.description: Create reusable Proxmox VM templates with cloud-init. Automate provisioning with Ansible, clean machine-id, and deploy Ubuntu cloud images. Full playbook included.

item.title: Proxmox Homelab Guide: Cloud-Init, Packer, Terraform, and LVM
item.description: Complete Proxmox homelab guide covering VM template automation with Packer, Ansible cloud-init provisioning, Terraform orchestration, and LVM troubleshooting.

item.title: Build Proxmox VM Templates with Packer — Complete Guide
item.description: Automate Proxmox VM template creation using HashiCorp Packer. HCL config, cloud-init integration, and CI/CD pipeline setup. Step-by-step with full source.

item.title: Proxmox Systems Administration — Disk Resize, GPU Passthrough, and More
item.description: Proxmox sysadmin reference covering hard disk resize, GPU passthrough, network configuration, and common maintenance tasks for homelab VMs.

item.title: Terraform Proxmox Provider — Deploy VMs with Telmate
item.description: Use the Telmate Terraform provider to deploy and manage Proxmox VMs as code. Full .tf examples, cloud-init integration, and provider configuration walkthrough.

item.title: AWS YouTube Transcript Analyser — Lambda, DynamoDB, and Transcribe
item.description: Automated system using AWS Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, SQS, and Amazon Transcribe to fetch YouTube transcripts and analyse channel sentiment.

item.title: Discord Bot: Camera's On — Enforcing Video Policy with a Bot
item.description: Building a Discord bot to enforce cameras-on policy in voice channels. Developed with Claude 3 Opus, covers bot setup, event handling, and deployment.

item.title: Microservices Project — Containerised Service Architecture
item.description: Microservices project notes covering containerised service architecture, Docker Compose setup, and inter-service communication patterns.

item.title: Personal AI — Private Offline Assistant Project Notes
item.description: Research notes for building a personal AI assistant trained on private documents, using PrivateGPT and local LLMs for offline, private conversations.

item.title: Holo Live Network — TryHackMe Walkthrough
item.description: TryHackMe Holo Live network walkthrough covering Active Directory enumeration, lateral movement, and domain controller compromise.

item.title: Mr Robot CTF Walkthrough — TryHackMe (All 3 Keys)
item.description: Complete Mr Robot TryHackMe walkthrough covering all 3 keys — WordPress enumeration, reverse shell, SUID nmap privilege escalation. Step-by-step with screenshots.

item.title: Lab Notes: AI Bias Mitigation in Gemini - A Geopolitical Stress Test
item.description: An experiment testing whether prompting techniques and Gemini Gems can mitigate Western bias in geopolitical analysis. Spoiler: the bias is architectural, not configurable.

item.title: Proxmox pmxcfs Rollback: When Pi-hole Disappears After a Power Failure (Part 1)
item.description: Diagnosing a Proxmox pmxcfs cluster filesystem rollback after a power outage that caused Docker and Pi-hole to vanish from a VM. Covers investigation, root cause analysis, and recovery strategy for orphaned VM disks.

item.title: NextAuth Session Caching Bug: How CloudFront Gave Everyone the Same Login
item.description: Debugging a critical session caching issue where CloudFront cached authenticated responses, causing all users to share the same NextAuth session. Covers cache-control headers, auth middleware, and AWS Amplify fixes.

item.title: Complaint: RNZ 'New Gaza' Article
item.description: How to submit a formal complaint to RNZ about their 'US touts New Gaza filled with luxury real estate' article. Includes step-by-step instructions and complaint text you can use.

item.title: Debugging AWS Amplify SSR: Unable to Assume IAM Role
item.description: Troubleshooting guide for 'Unable to assume specified IAM Role' errors when deploying Next.js SSR apps to AWS Amplify. Covers trust policies, service roles, and the CLI vs Console workaround.

item.title: AWS ECS Microservices Workshop - Container Orchestration and Service Architecture
item.description: Complete AWS ECS microservices workshop covering container deployment, service mesh architecture, load balancing, and scalable microservice patterns on Amazon ECS.
